title: 7 Herbal Tinctures For Sinus Headache
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures contains alkylamides, glycosides, and phenolic acids, which are key bioactive constituents that help alleviate sinus headaches. Alkylamides have anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling and congestion in the sinuses, relieving headache symptoms. Glycosides, particularly echinacoside, have immunomodulatory effects, supporting the body's natural defense mechanisms to fight off underlying infections that may cause sinus headaches.
